settings.title: I'm in love
settings.text: I really liked the way this suit fits, slimming my figure. I have seen many similar models, but here the fabric is of the highest quality. You don't have to worry about your swimsuit coming off during a wipeout. And after surfing you can effectively unzip your chest and go drink a coconut 🥥
settings.author: Elizaveta Bogatyreva (Tabanan, ID)

settings.title: Functional fashion
settings.text: I love my Mentawai suit in Snow! It fits like a glove and works wonders both in small waves and bigger days. The suit stays on and looks great at the same time. When you don’t have to worry about bikinis flying off in the whitewash, you can focus more on riding waves. I love functional fashion and OSB nails it! Hope to get more colors soon 😍
settings.author: Katherine Matias

settings.title: What are the benefits of one-piece swimsuits?
settings.content: One-piece swimsuits can provide more coverage and support compared to bikinis, making them a great choice for activities like swimming, water sports, or lounging by the pool or beach. They can also offer sun protection for your torso and can be more comfortable for some people who prefer not to show as much skin.

settings.title: Why do swimmers/surfers wear one-piece swimsuits?
settings.content: They are perfect for water sports.  Whether you're an avid swimmer or surfer – one-piece swim suits offer the best peace of mind. This style means you don't have to contend with pesky straps which may fall as you engage in some serious water sport activity.

settings.title: Is a one-piece swimsuit more flattering?
settings.content: One-piece swimsuits can be flattering for many body types. They can provide support and coverage in all the right places.  Ultimately, the most important thing is to choose a swimsuit that makes you feel comfortable and confident.

settings.title: What is UPF swimwear?
settings.content: UPF (or Ultraviolet Protection Factor) swimwear is swimwear that offers protection from the sun's UVA and UVB rays. UPF relates to protection from clothing whilst SPF relates to sunscreen.

settings.title: What do you wear under a surf suit?
settings.content: With our one piece swimsuits, you don’t need to wear anything underneath! The cut is designed to be super supportive to hold you in.

settings.title: Will the white colour be transparent when wet?
settings.content: We double line all of our swimsuits, and our white suits are lined with a skin colour fabric to prevent them from becoming transparent.
